title: Fix cPanel Home stuck on Loading your workspace
description:
Home never rendered the Buy Subscription button because cpanel-access.js threw a ReferenceError on load (SAAS_PIPESHARE_DOMAIN and related constants were exported but never defined). That prevented HPCpanelAccess from initializing, so home.js exited early and left the loading placeholder.

Defined those constants from deployment config. Added a 12s loading timeout fallback on Home if billing API is slow.

Who is affected: pipeshare.net cPanel purchasers (e.g. new sign-ups on expired subscription). Hard refresh after deploy.
changeLog: Fix cpanel-access.js ReferenceError that blocked Home from rendering.
Restore Buy Subscription button and PipeShare/PipeSync bullet showcase.
Home shows subscribe fallback if billing API does not respond in 12 seconds.
